options.name: -generate_cap_file
options.description: Generates a file containing a list of paths containing max capacitance violations.

options.name: -generate_fanout_file
options.description: Generates a file containing a list of paths containing max fanout violations.

options.name: -generate_tran_file
options.description: Generates a file containing a list of paths containing max transition violations.

options.name: -load_cap_file
options.description: Reads a file containing a list of paths containing max capacitance violations.

options.name: -load_fanout_file
options.description: Reads a file containing a list of paths containing max fanout violations.

options.name: -load_tran_file
options.description: Reads a file containing a list of paths containing max transition violations.

options.name: -master
options.description: Specifies that the analysis should be performed only for the specified master category.
